hints.question: How do I animate?
hints.answer: To animate, we're following the flipbook style - redraw the whole scene each time over the top of the previous versions.

hints.question: I don't know where to start.
hints.answer: You need to draw 100 times. So start by moving the existing drawing functions into a repeat loop that runs 100 times. Then you need to change the variables (radius, colors, etc), for each time the loop runs.

hints.question: Where do I put my variables?
hints.answer: You need to set your variables BEFORE the loop, then update them INSIDE the loop, BEFORE drawing the shapes. Think through Jiki creating boxes and updating them each time.
